## Issue

Closes #

## Visible result

Describe the tangible change a player or developer can observe compared with the preceding build.

## Framework and architecture

Summarise new framework capability, package/API changes and important design decisions.

## Verification

List the commands actually run, for example:

- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Manual/mobile checks

- [ ] Desktop browser
- [ ] Physical phone — portrait
- [ ] Physical phone — landscape
- [ ] Touch-only flow
- [ ] Deployed/static build where applicable

Describe what was checked and provide a playable URL when available.

## Determinism and saving

Explain any effect on seeded outcomes, RNG state, saves, migrations or replay. Write `Not applicable` when the issue does not touch these systems.

## Deferred work and limitations

List intentionally out-of-scope work, temporary implementation choices and follow-up issues.
